tagline: Licensed roof repair & replacement in Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Roofing Done Right — a licensed Santa Rosa roofing contractor (CSLB #1105080) led by Juan Antonio Mejia, ranked in the top 5% of California contractors, with same- or next-day estimates. Roof repair, metal roofing, skylights, gutters and roof cleaning across Sonoma County.
heroHeading: Licensed roof repair & replacement in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: Owner-operated by Juan Antonio Mejia — a licensed Santa Rosa roofer (CSLB #1105080) ranked in the top 5% of California contractors — offering fast, fairly-priced roof repair, metal roofing and gutter work with same- or next-day estimates.
highlights: Roof repair, metal roofing, skylights & gutters
aboutBody: Roofing Done Right is an owner-operated Santa Rosa roofing company led by Juan Antonio Mejia, who brings roughly ten years of roofing experience to every job. The focus is straightforward: responsive scheduling, careful workmanship, and simple, affordable pricing.

From leak and roof repair to metal roofing, skylight installation, gutter work and roof cleaning, Roofing Done Right serves homeowners across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County. The company is a licensed California roofing contractor (CSLB #1105080), ranked by BuildZoom in the top 5% of the state's contractors, and offers same- or next-day estimates.

services.title: Roof Repair
services.description: Fast, affordable repair of leaks, storm damage and worn roofing for homes across Sonoma County.

services.title: Metal Roofing
services.description: Durable metal roofing installation built to stand up to Sonoma County weather.

services.title: Skylight Installation
services.description: Professional skylight installation that brings in natural light without leaks.

services.title: Gutters & Roof Cleaning
services.description: Gutter repair and cleaning plus full roof cleaning to keep water moving and your roof healthy.

testimonials.quote: I got five bids and Juan's was the best — his personal attention was better than the other four roofers I contacted. Responsive, fast, and a simple, affordable pricing structure.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Santa Rosa

notes: Verified from public web research (Yelp 66 photos/12 reviews, BuildZoom top 5%, CSLB #1105080 active). Owner Juan Antonio Mejia, ~10 yrs experience. Testimonial condensed from a real Yelp review (reviewer's name not public in research). No usable own photos → photo-less editorial build. Address 2522 Tachevah Dr, Santa Rosa; (707) 791-0494. Founding year not confirmed — omitted. Yelp-only, no real website — primary 'no website' target.
